metadata.description: Rare Data Club's Claude Code plugins: CSS layout primitives, web-archive recovery, and archival-grade audio mixdown.

plugins.name: every-layout
plugins.description: Axiom-enforced CSS layout primitives, Astro 5 site architecture, archival data patterns, and design system tokens. 13 composable primitives, 32 numbered principles, 6 axioms enforced by CI-grade strict-check and JS-budget gates. Zero-JS-by-default, media-query-free, modular-scale spacing.

plugins.name: wayback-archive
plugins.description: Recover product databases from defunct e-commerce sites via Wayback Machine, CommonCrawl, and Shopify CDN archaeology. Self-contained 9-stage pipeline: CDX dump, filter, fetch, Shopify CDN discovery, match, download, normalize, build. Supports Shopify, Swell Commerce, Fourthwall, and custom platforms.

plugins.name: stems-to-mixdown
plugins.description: Sum a directory of multitrack audio stems into stereo mixdowns (acapella, instrumental, custom groupings) at the highest quality the source material honestly supports. Six-pass pipeline (identify → optional Pro Tools track-name borrow → analyze → plan → mix → verify) with full provenance: SHA-anchored idempotency, sidecar logs per output, declared pan law, ITU-R BS.1770 true-peak headroom, dither when reducing depth, and refusal-by-default for upsampling, normalization, and writing into the source folder. Optional master-reference pipeline (Cmd 19) produces a three-synced-versions reference-bundle and runs a recombine-null + inverse-stems-null verification battery against the released master. Eighteen commandments, all cited by error messages and plan rationale.
